notes: Works perfectly fine. Takes a second to start up, but other than that no issues. If you're having trouble with not being able to connect to friends, it's not because of Proton. Make sure you are both have the same region set in the game settings.

notes:
Runs almost perfecly OOTB. I just had some graphical issues with max graphics settings. If you expereince them too (You will notice that), try to reduce some graphics settings (escepcially Quality preset and texture quality). 
And once i had a complety black screen after loading the map. Quitting and retrying resolved that issue.
